overall.description: A first-person walk along a foggy waterfront highway at night in a cyberpunk game environment. The scene features an industrial warehouse with smokestacks, streetlights cutting through heavy fog, and occasional vehicles passing on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal highway with industrial warehouse

events.description: first vehicle approaches and passes on the right
second vehicle approaches and passes on the right
passing the first streetlight pole, temporarily obscuring view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy waterfront road toward the industrial building

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past in the opposite direction with headlights on

entered.detail: rusted metal barrier separating the road from the waterfront drop
large concrete industrial building with flat roof and minimal windows
tall streetlight pole with warm orange sodium vapor lamp cutting through fog
illuminated advertisement sign on the warehouse roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a coastal highway. The camera walks forward past a metal guardrail with the sea hidden in fog to the left. An industrial warehouse looms ahead on the right, marked by a distant billboard. Two vehicles pass by in quick succession, their headlights cutting through the mist, as the camera approaches the first streetlight.

events.description: vehicle passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road alongside the industrial warehouse wall

notable_agents.action: car driving past with red taillights visible in the fog

entered.detail: dark smoke emitting from industrial chimneys atop the warehouse
second streetlight visible in the distance through the fog

segments.scene_description: Moving alongside the industrial warehouse, the camera passes the first streetlight and approaches the building's facade. Smoke rises from chimneys on the roof, visible against the fog. The warehouse wall dominates the right side of the frame now, and a second streetlight becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy waterfront with distant city lights

events.description: vehicle passes by on the right
another vehicle approaches from ahead with bright headlights

agents.ego_description: walking past the industrial complex into the open fog with city lights visible ahead

notable_agents.action: truck driving past slowly with headlights illuminating the fog

entered.detail: faint glowing lights of a distant city barely visible through the heavy fog

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the second streetlight and moves beyond the main industrial building, which now recedes into the fog behind. The scene opens up to reveal distant city lights glowing faintly through the mist ahead. Vehicles continue to pass periodically on the road as the walk continues into the deepening fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a foggy coastal highway that transitions from a desolate industrial stretch toward the faint glow of a distant city. It begins by walking past a metal guardrail with the sea obscured by mist, as the headlights of passing vehicles cut through the haze toward a looming industrial warehouse. As the camera moves closer, the scene shifts to the immediate presence of the warehouse facade, where smoke rises from roof chimneys into the heavy night air. The camera then passes a series of streetlights and moves beyond the industrial building, allowing the structure to recede into the fog. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal the dim, atmospheric lights of a city glowing through the mist as vehicles continue to pass on the wet road.
